sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INT, value FLOAT, description VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id INT, value INT);

SELECT id, last_value(value) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING), ~COALESCE(value, 0) FROM test_table1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table2 WHERE value < 25);

SELECT t1.id, last_value(~t1.value) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.id ORDER BY t1.value), t2.value FROM test_table1 t1 JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id GROUP BY t1.id, t1.value, t2.value HAVING last_value(t1.value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, last_value(COALESCE(~value, 0)) OVER () as adjusted_value FROM (SELECT id, ~value as value FROM test_table1) sub;
SELECT id, last_value(~(value + 1.5)) OVER (ORDER BY id) FROM test_table1 WHERE description LIKE 'Test%';
SELECT t1.id, last_value(t1.value) OVER (ORDER BY t1.id ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), ~t2.value FROM test_table1 t1 LEFT JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, last_value(~value) OVER (ORDER BY id) AS negated_last_value FROM test_table1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT last_value(value) FROM temp_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM temp_table WHERE id > 0);
